text: Did you know the Moon pulls on our oceans? Its gravity stretches Earth, creating bulges in the water. These bulges mean high tides where the pull is strongest. But there's another bulge on the opposite side of Earth, too. This creates two high tides each day, every day. Curious about more cosmic wonders? Hit subscribe for more!
